ddls:
CREATE TABLE "musical_pieces" (
  "piece_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each musical piece */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the musical piece */,
  "composer" TEXT /* Name of the composer */,
  "year_composed" INTEGER /* Year the piece was composed */,
  "duration" REAL /* Total duration of the piece in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the piece */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the piece (e.g., classical, jazz, rock) */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the piece (e.g., Baroque, Classical, Romantic) */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period of the piece (e.g., Renaissance, Classical, Modern) */,
  " Instruments" TEXT /* Instruments used in the piece */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the piece was created in the database */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the piece was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("piece_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "piece_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the musical piece the measure belongs to */,
  "measure_number" INTEGER /* Measure number */,
  "voice" INTEGER /* Voice number in the measure */,
  "timesig" TEXT /* Time signature of the measure */,
  "globalkey" TEXT /* Global key of the measure */,
  "localkey" TEXT /* Local key of the measure */,
  "duration_qb" REAL /* Duration of the measure in quarter beats */,
  "quarterbeats" INTEGER /* Quarter beats in the measure */,
  "quarterbeats_all_endings" INTEGER /* Quarter beats in all endings of the measure */,
  "mc_onset" REAL /* Onset time of the measure in the piece */,
  "mn_onset" REAL /* Onset time of the measure in the measure number */,
  "staff" INTEGER /* Staff number */,
  "tempo_marking" TEXT /* Tempo marking of the measure (e.g., Largo, Presto) */,
  "dynamic_marking" TEXT /* Dynamic marking of the measure (e.g., f, p, ff) */,
  "articulation" TEXT /* Articulation of the measure (e.g., Legato, Staccato) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the measure was created in the database */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the measure was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_piece_id FOREIGN KEY ("piece_id") REFERENCES musical_pieces ("piece_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chords" (
  "chord_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chord */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measure the chord belongs to */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the chord */,
  "alt_label" TEXT /* Alternative label of the chord */,
  "chord" TEXT /* Chord symbol */,
  "numeral" TEXT /* Numeral of the chord */,
  "figbass" TEXT /* Figured bass */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes in the chord */,
  "relativeroot" TEXT /* Relative root of the chord */,
  "cadence" TEXT /* Cadence type */,
  "phraseend" TEXT /* Phrase end */,
  "chord_type" TEXT /* Chord type */,
  "globalkey_is_minor" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the global key is minor */,
  "localkey_is_minor" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the local key is minor */,
  " creado_date" TEXT /* Date the chord was created in the database */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the chord was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chord_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chords_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chord_tones" (
  "chord_tone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chord tone entry */,
  "chord_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chord the tones belong to */,
  "chord_tones" TEXT /* List of chord tones */,
  "added_tones" TEXT /* List of added tones */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the chord tone was created in the database */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the chord tone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chord_tone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chord_tones_chord_id FOREIGN KEY ("chord_id") REFERENCES chords ("chord_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., musicologist, composer, educator) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created in the database */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "piece_id" INTEGER /* ID of the musical piece being accessed */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measure being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the piece or measure */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the piece or measure was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access (e.g., comments, annotations) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was created in the database */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_piece_id FOREIGN KEY ("piece_id") REFERENCES musical_pieces ("piece_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "piece_id" INTEGER /* ID of the musical piece being annotated */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measure being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., comment, marking, highlight) */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was created in the database */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_piece_id FOREIGN KEY ("piece_id") REFERENCES musical_pieces ("piece_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "piece_id" INTEGER /* ID of the musical piece being analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the analysis */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was made */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor, draft) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created in the database */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_versions_piece_id FOREIGN KEY ("piece_id") REFERENCES musical_pieces ("piece_id")
)
